'''talïfthïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyelotomy|pyelotomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyelotomy|pyelotomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| talïfthïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || tælïfthïfth || tælïfthïfj || tælïfthïfsh || tælïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || talïflïfthïfth || talïflïfthïfj || talïflïfthïfsh || talïflïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || talïfthïfth || talïfthïfj || talïfthïfsh || talïfthïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || talïffthïffth || talïffthïffj || talïffthïffsh || talïffthïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || talïfthïfïf || talïfthïfïf || talïfthïfïf || talïfthïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || talïfthïfth || talïfthïfj || talïfthïfsh || talïfthïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || talïfthïfïfl || talïfthïfïfl || talïfthïfïfl || talïfthïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || talïfthïfïfïf || talïfthïfïfïf || talïfthïfïfïf || talïfthïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || talïfthïfïfn || talïfthïfïfn || talïfthïfïfn || talïfthïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || talïfthïfïforo || talïfthïfïforo || talïfthïfïforo || talïfthïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
